creator: alex@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: alex->freebsd-doc

I would have loved to make changes/add these publications to the  
publications list. However, the originator (not wosch, the one, who wrote 
the mail to wosch) is not able to tell me, what kind of publications 
these are, not even a title or something. 

Since I don't speak Korean (?), I leave this open for a committer who actually 
does. Hopefully, there is one.
